justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability without offering concrete alternative dates or times, only asking the user to suggest new ones.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for single days when the user asked for a range of days, and also repeated the same apologies and alternative suggestions multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots and its repetitive apologies and suggestions for online/phone meetings, despite the user's clear preference for in-branch.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by continuing to search for new dates as requested, but it did not expand its search intelligently by offering specific alternative slots, instead repeatedly asking the user for new dates or suggesting other contact methods.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest available in-branch appointments, even when none were found for an extended period, led to a frustrating and inefficient customer experience.
